Class SavingsAccount

java.lang.Object
com.bankcore.model.Account
com.bankcore.model.SavingsAccount
All Implemented Interfaces:
Interestable, Taxable
public class SavingsAccount extends Account implements Interestable, Taxable
Represents a savings account with interest rate. Extends Account with interest calculation capability.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Haytam

  • Constructor Details

    • SavingsAccount

      public SavingsAccount(String ownerName, double initBalance, double interestRate)
      Parameters:
      ownerName - owner of the account
      initBalance - starting balance
      interestRate - annual interest rate (e.g. 0.03 for 3%)

    • getInterestRate

      public void applyInterest()
      Applies annual interest to the balance.
      Specified by:
      applyInterest in interface Interestable

    • withdraw

      public void withdraw(double amount) throws InsufficientFundsException
      Withdraws amount from the savings account.
      Specified by:
      withdraw in class Account
      Parameters:
      amount - must be positive and not exceed current balance
      Throws:
      InsufficientFundsException

      public String toString()

    • applyTax

      public void applyTax(double taxRate)
      apply tax in the current balance
      Specified by:
      applyTax in interface Taxable
      Parameters:
      taxRate - tax from external
